heading: Restrictions
label: 22105 Restrictions
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22105(a)36:342 (2d sentence words before 1st comma)., §§ 2 (2d, last sentences), 7, , 871.Sept. 20, 1950, ch. 95864 Stat. 87022105(b)36:347 (1st sentence words before 2d comma).22105(c)36:342 (last sentence).22105(d)36:342 (2d sentence words after 1st comma).22105(e)36:347 (1st sentence words after 2d comma, last sentence).In subsection (b), the words “shares of” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (d), the words “inure to the benefit of” are substituted for “inure to” for consistency in the revised title.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22105(a)36:342 (2d sentence words before 1st comma)., §§ 2 (2d, last sentences), 7, , 871.Sept. 20, 1950, ch. 95864 Stat. 87022105(b)36:347 (1st sentence words before 2d comma).22105(c)36:342 (last sentence).22105(d)36:342 (2d sentence words after 1st comma).22105(e)36:347 (1st sentence words after 2d comma, last sentence).In subsection (b), the words “shares of” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (d), the words “inure to the benefit of” are substituted for “inure to” for consistency in the revised title.

children.heading: .—Profit
children.label: a .—Profit
children.text: The corporation may not operate for profit.

children.heading: .—Stock and Dividends
children.label: b .—Stock and Dividends
children.text: The corporation may not issue stock or declare or pay a dividend.

children.heading: .—Political Activities
children.label: c .—Political Activities
children.text: The corporation or an officer or member of the executive council as such may not contribute to, support, or assist a political party or candidate for elective public office.

children.heading: .—Distribution of Income or Assets
children.label: d .—Distribution of Income or Assets
children.text: The income or assets of the corporation may not inure to the benefit of, or be distributed to, a member of the corporation or an officer or member of the executive council, except on the dissolution or final liquidation of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Loans
children.label: e .—Loans
children.text: The corporation may not make a loan or advance to an officer or member of the executive council. Members of the council who vote for or assent to making a loan or advance to an officer or member of the council, and officers who participate in making the loan or advance, are jointly and severally liable to the corporation for the amount of the loan or advance until it is repaid.
